title: L.U.M.A. V2: Universal Management Agent
short_desc: A localized, high-performance engineering OS and personal assistant inspired by the F.R.I.D.A.Y. standard. Features asynchronous neural speech queuing, real-time HUD telemetry, and direct project tracking constraints.
blueprint_desc: Operates on a modular 'Nerve-Link' layout isolating core directories. The brain integrates an offline LLM interface via Ollama, a neural voice engine handling XTTS-v2 synthesis, and a real-time visual UI mapped using Pygame. Transitioned to a fluid YAML-native archive layout (projects.yaml, session.yaml, and persona.md) to manage context memory and custom behavioral adjustments cleanly.
